heading: Performance Advisor
body:
The [Performance Advisor](performance-advisor) monitors queries
that MongoDB considers slow and suggests new indexes to improve query
performance.

You can use the Performance Advisor to review the following information:

- [Review Index Ranking](pa-index-ranking)

- [Drop unused, redundant, and hidden indexes](pa-drop-index)

> **Tip:** You can also access Performance Advisor recommendations from AI clients
> by using the [MongoDB MCP Server](mcp-server). This tool
> enables you to interact with your Atlas clusters through natural language.
> To learn more, see [Access Performance Advisor with the MongoDB MCP Server](performance-advisor-mcp).
